response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience and notable geospatial domain background (GISCollective, Green Map, FOSS4G talk), plus low-latency systems work in DLang at Sociomantic. However, the role specifically requires modern C++ (or Rust) commercial experience, and the resume shows only brief C/C++ work nearly two decades ago at National Instruments, with recent work centered on TypeScript/Node.js. The systems-programming mindset and GIS domain knowledge are valuable, but the core language requirement is a significant gap for a Senior IC role.
strengths: Deep geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Green Map
Low-latency, async systems experience (DLang, fibers, high-throughput services at Sociomantic)
Berlin-based, long tenure, strong engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
concerns: No recent modern C++ experience and no Rust experience listed
Recent work is primarily TypeScript/Node.js, not systems-level pipeline development
No demonstrated navigation/routing or production map-tile pipeline experience
